newt.name: newt
newt.notes: Can drain STR or DEX on hit. Do NOT melee as wizard. Let pet handle.

jackal.name: jackal
jackal.notes: Fast, low damage. Let pet handle or flee if HP < 60%.

fox.name: fox
fox.notes: Faster than jackal. Flee if HP < 60%.

kitten.name: kitten
kitten.notes: Your starting pet. Do NOT attack. Use wait to let it move first.

little dog.name: little dog
little dog.notes: Starting pet for some roles. Do NOT attack.

grid bug.name: grid bug
grid bug.notes: Only moves cardinally. Dodge diagonally. Low XP.

kobold.name: kobold
kobold.notes: Weak melee. Sometimes carries items. Let pet handle.

goblin.name: goblin
goblin.notes: Weak early enemy. Can carry items. Avoid melee as wizard.

lichen.name: lichen
lichen.notes: Moves very slowly. Can grab and hold you (slows movement). Kill quickly or flee. No stat drain.

rat.name: rat
rat.notes: Fast, low damage. Let pet handle.

bat.name: bat
bat.notes: Flies, erratic movement. Low damage. Let pet handle.

hobgoblin.name: hobgoblin
hobgoblin.notes: Stronger than goblin. Avoid melee as wizard.

orc.name: orc
orc.notes: Can carry weapons/armor. Dangerous in groups. Flee if multiple.

gnome.name: gnome
gnome.notes: Can carry items. Sometimes has wands. Let pet handle.

zombie.name: zombie
zombie.notes: Slow but can cause disease. Avoid melee. Let pet handle.

skeleton.name: skeleton
skeleton.notes: Immune to cold, sleep, poison. Can throw bones. Flee.

snake.name: snake
snake.notes: Can poison. Avoid melee as wizard.

yellow mold.name: yellow mold
yellow mold.notes: Stationary. Releases spores when hit. Avoid melee.

gas spore.name: gas spore
gas spore.notes: EXPLODES on death dealing massive damage. Never melee. Flee immediately.

floating eye.name: floating eye
floating eye.notes: Paralyzes you if you melee it. NEVER attack directly. Use wand or let pet handle.

leprechaun.name: leprechaun
leprechaun.notes: Steals gold. Fast. Flee or let pet handle.

nymph.name: nymph
nymph.notes: Steals items from inventory. Flee immediately on sight.
